_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Add test-location and assertion-scoping guidance to Issue Design Template

steps.description: Edit templates/design/Issue_Design_Template.md to add (1) a test-location paragraph naming tests/dashboard/, tests/unit/, and tests/integration/ in the 'Test to Reproduce' section, and (2) an assertion-scoping paragraph in 'TDD Approach' showing the unsafe bare-class-name form vs. the safe `class="..."` attribute form. Then run `uv run iw sync-templates` so all four registered projects' ai-dev/templates/Issue_Design_Template.md become byte-identical to the master.

Review S01: AC1 (test-location rule names all three directories and the dashboard `client` fixture trigger), AC2 (assertion-scoping rule names the failure mode and shows both forms), AC3 (filecmp.cmp returns True master vs. local copy — note that copies in other projects' worktrees live outside this repo and cannot be diff-checked from here, so accept S01's command output as evidence for those), AC4 (no files outside scope.allowed_paths were touched).

Final cross-step review of CR-00032. Confirm the design's four acceptance criteria are all satisfied, the diff against main is bounded to the two template files, and the new wording does not contradict any existing guidance in the template or in CLAUDE.md.
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
